description: Offline research experiment catalog. All experiments are offline/advisory only. release_hold=HOLD.

experiments.label: Baseline Major Pairs 5m/15m
experiments.description: Baseline configuration: BTC/ETH on 5m and 15m timeframes with all four strategies. Standard entry point for offline research.
experiments.notes: Baseline experiment. Use as reference for other experiments.

experiments.label: Breakout Only 5m
experiments.description: Isolate breakout strategy on 5m timeframe. No other strategies active.

experiments.label: Momentum Only 15m
experiments.description: Isolate momentum strategy on 15m timeframe.

experiments.label: Mean Reversion Only 5m
experiments.description: Isolate mean reversion strategy on 5m timeframe.

experiments.label: Volatility Compression Only 15m
experiments.description: Isolate volatility compression strategy on 15m timeframe.

experiments.label: Low Budget Smoke Test
experiments.description: Minimal budget smoke test for pipeline validation. Fast run, low fidelity.
experiments.notes: Smoke test only. Not for research decisions.

experiments.label: Medium Budget Review
experiments.description: Medium budget for preliminary review. Balanced speed and fidelity.

experiments.label: High Budget Offline Review
experiments.description: High budget comprehensive offline review. Full fidelity, longer runtime.

experiments.label: BTC/ETH Only
experiments.description: Restricted to BTC and ETH symbols only. Tests major pair focus.

experiments.label: Multi-Timeframe Focus
experiments.description: Test across multiple timeframes with emphasis on timeframe diversity.

experiments.label: Rolling Split Focus
experiments.description: Test rolling split mode in depth. Validates temporal consistency.

experiments.label: Anchored Split Focus
experiments.description: Test anchored split mode. Validates fixed-origin temporal analysis.

experiments.label: Negative Control Focus
experiments.description: Focus on negative control validation. Tests that strategies do not overfit to noise.

experiments.label: Bootstrap Confidence Focus
experiments.description: Focus on bootstrap confidence interval estimation. Higher iteration count.

experiments.label: Regime Breakdown Focus
experiments.description: Focus on regime-based performance breakdown. Tests stability across market regimes.

experiments.label: Portfolio Overlap Focus
experiments.description: Focus on portfolio overlap risk measurement. Tests strategy correlation.

experiments.label: Parameter Fragility Focus
experiments.description: Focus on parameter fragility assessment. Tests sensitivity to parameter changes.

experiments.label: Reproducibility Focus
experiments.description: Focus on reproducibility verification. Runs identical config twice and compares.

experiments.label: Report Quality Focus
experiments.description: Focus on output report quality and completeness. Validates all report sections.

experiments.label: Human Review Focus
experiments.description: Focus on human review packet completeness. Full pipeline including review packet generation.

experiments.label: Altcoin Universe 5m
experiments.description: Test strategies on altcoin universe: SOL, ADA, DOT, LINK on 5m.

experiments.label: Small Cap Universe 15m
experiments.description: Test strategies on smaller-cap symbols on 15m timeframe.

experiments.label: Wide Universe 5m/15m
experiments.description: Test all strategies on wide symbol universe across 5m and 15m.

experiments.label: Single 1m Focus
experiments.description: Test strategies on 1-minute timeframe. High-frequency signal test.

experiments.label: Hourly Focus
experiments.description: Test strategies on 1-hour timeframe. Lower frequency signal test.

experiments.label: Multi-TF 5m/15m/1h
experiments.description: Test strategies across three timeframes: 5m, 15m, 1h.

experiments.label: Walk Forward Split Focus
experiments.description: Test walk-forward split mode. Validates forward-looking temporal analysis.

experiments.label: Expanding Split Focus
experiments.description: Test expanding split mode. Validates expanding window temporal analysis.

experiments.label: Ultra Low Budget
experiments.description: Minimal search budget for fast pipeline smoke. Not for research decisions.

experiments.label: Very High Budget
experiments.description: Very high search budget for maximum fidelity offline review.

experiments.label: Robustness Walk Forward
experiments.description: Robustness test using walk-forward split. Tests stability under forward validation.

experiments.label: Robustness Expanding
experiments.description: Robustness test using expanding split. Tests stability under expanding window.

experiments.label: Robustness Multi-Seed
experiments.description: Robustness test with alternative deterministic seed. Tests seed independence.

experiments.label: Negative Control Altcoin
experiments.description: Negative control on altcoin universe. Tests overfit resistance on non-major pairs.

experiments.label: Negative Control Shuffled
experiments.description: Negative control with shuffled data fixture. Tests strategy response to randomized input.

experiments.label: Bootstrap High Iteration
experiments.description: Bootstrap confidence with high search budget. Tests convergence of confidence intervals.

experiments.label: Bootstrap Altcoin
experiments.description: Bootstrap confidence on altcoin universe. Tests confidence interval stability on altcoins.

experiments.label: Regime Bull/Bear
experiments.description: Regime analysis focused on bull vs bear market breakdown. Tests directional regime stability.

experiments.label: Regime High Volatility
experiments.description: Regime analysis focused on high-volatility periods. Tests volatility regime stability.

experiments.label: Portfolio Max Correlation
experiments.description: Portfolio risk test focused on maximum pairwise correlation measurement.

experiments.label: Portfolio Sector Concentration
experiments.description: Portfolio risk test focused on sector concentration limits.

experiments.label: Reproducibility Cross-Run
experiments.description: Reproducibility test across two identical runs with same seed. Validates bit-exact reproducibility.

experiments.label: Reproducibility Seed Variation
experiments.description: Reproducibility test comparing two different seeds. Validates that different seeds produce different results.

experiments.label: Report Quality Full Pipeline
experiments.description: Report quality test through full pipeline. Validates all report sections including review packet.

experiments.label: Report Quality Comparison
experiments.description: Report quality test for comparison analytics output. Validates comparison report sections.

experiments.label: Human Review Minimal
experiments.description: Minimal human review packet. Tests that review packet is complete with minimal artifacts.

experiments.label: Human Review Comprehensive
experiments.description: Comprehensive human review packet with all artifact types. Full checklist validation.

experiments.label: Smoke Test Minimal
experiments.description: Minimal smoke test. Single strategy, single symbol, single timeframe. Fastest possible run.

experiments.label: Smoke Test Pipeline
experiments.description: Pipeline smoke test. Tests full pipeline path with minimal data.

experiments.label: Stress Test High Volume
experiments.description: Stress test with high search budget and chunk size. Tests pipeline under load.

experiments.label: Stress Test Many Symbols
experiments.description: Stress test with many symbols. Tests pipeline with wide symbol universe.

experiments.label: Stress Test Long Timeframe
experiments.description: Stress test with long timeframe. Tests pipeline with 4h and 1d data.

experiments.label: Sparse Signal Low Frequency
experiments.description: Sparse signal test on low-frequency timeframes. Tests strategy behavior with few signals.

experiments.label: Sparse Signal Single Symbol
experiments.description: Sparse signal test on single symbol. Tests strategy behavior with limited signal diversity.

experiments.label: Noisy Fixture Random Seed
experiments.description: Noisy fixture test with alternative seed. Tests strategy response to seed variation.

experiments.label: Noisy Fixture Corrupted
experiments.description: Noisy fixture test simulating corrupted data input. Tests pipeline resilience.

experiments.label: Adverse Fixture Bear Market
experiments.description: Adverse fixture simulating bear market conditions. Tests strategy drawdown behavior.

experiments.label: Adverse Fixture Flash Crash
experiments.description: Adverse fixture simulating flash crash conditions. Tests strategy recovery behavior.

experiments.label: Comparison Cross-Strategy
experiments.description: Cross-strategy comparison analytics. Compares all four strategies head-to-head.

experiments.label: Comparison Cross-Symbol
experiments.description: Cross-symbol comparison analytics. Compares performance across symbol universe.
